message:
Add font-size passthrough for SVG rendering and Gantt IR metadata

Two related changes to extend diagram rendering capabilities:

1. fm-cli: Thread an optional font_size parameter through render_format()
   into SvgRenderConfig so the --font-size CLI flag actually takes effect
   in SVG output. Previously the flag was parsed but never forwarded to
   the renderer. All call-sites updated (including tests) to pass the
   new parameter.

2. fm-parser: Import IrGanttMeta from fm-core and add
   IrBuilder::set_gantt_meta() so the parser can attach Gantt-specific
   metadata (date format, axis format, title, excludes, etc.) to the IR.
   This is the plumbing needed before the Gantt diagram type can carry
   its configuration through the parse -> layout -> render pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
